statusDetail: Anton completed the scheduled site-improvement loop and recorded the result.
actionRequired: No action needed unless you want to review the latest commit.
summary:
Implemented the next Owner Workflow Upgrade slice for Garage restore clarity and safety.

Changed:
- Split the dense restore helper copy into scan-friendly Activity / Backup / Photos notes in [garage.html](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/garage.html:90).
- Added a visible backup preview card before restore, with generated date and recognized data areas in [garage.js](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/garage.js:438) and [styles.css](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/styles.css:5598).
- Tightened restore import sanitization so top-level and area-journal photo `dataUrl` bytes are stripped before merge in [garage-data.js](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/garage-data.js:437).
- Updated smoke assertions, search copy, service-worker cache to `v269`, and Anton state/backlog/roadmap/audit notes.

Verified:
- `Test-InternalLinks.ps1` passed for 16 HTML files.
- `Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1 -Pages garage.html` still hits the known Edge `--dump-dom` empty-main issue.
- Playwright/Chrome fallback passed: invalid diagnostic handoff rejection, valid backup preview, restore enabling/reset, restored notes, photo-byte stripping, and no horizontal overflow on iPhone and desktop.
- Screenshots captured:
  - `debug-screenshots/audit-v269-garage-restore-preview-mobile.png`
  - `debug-screenshots/audit-v269-garage-restore-complete-mobile.png`
  - `debug-screenshots/audit-v269-garage-restore-desktop.png`

Next slice: review Garage restore with a real user backup file before designing any overwrite/merge conflict choices.
